---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for token-trim
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem / motivation

What are you trying to do, and what makes it hard today? If this is about a
specific command whose output isn't condensed well, name the command and share a
sample of its raw output.

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you'd like to happen - for example, a new
command condenser, a new option on `createCommandProxy` / `writeProxyScripts`, or
a change to existing behavior.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative approaches or workarounds you've thought about.

## Additional context

- Would this affect the generated scripts on a particular OS (Linux / macOS /
  Windows)?
- Any links, prior art, or example output that would help.
